title: tidestromia lanuginosa subsp. lanuginosa
intro: Tidestromia lanuginosa subsp. lanuginosa, also known as Woolly Tidestromia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae, characterized by its soft, woolly leaves and stems. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Woolly Tidestromia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps. Woolly Tidestromia can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to the affected area.
